title: compaction-fix Phase 1 data contracts
description: Trace marker shape + tweaks config keys consumed by the post-anchor transformer.

TraceMarker.description: Synthetic user-role message produced by the post-anchor transformer to replace a completed assistant turn (per DD-1).

text.description: Single-line trace; format: '[turn N] tool_a(brief_args) → WC042; tool_b(brief_args) → WC043; <reasoning summary 50ch>'

phase1Trace.description: Optional metadata for the trace marker (not sent to model; for storage / debugging only).

TweaksKeys.description: Config keys read from tweaks.cfg by the transformer (per DD-6).

compaction.phase1Enabled.description: Master switch for the post-anchor transformer. Default false for gradual rollout.

compaction.recentRawRounds.description: Number of most recent completed assistant turns to leave unchanged (per DD-2).

compaction.fallbackThreshold.description: If transformed message count drops below this, fall back to raw (per DD-4).

LayerPurityForbiddenKeys.description: Keys that MUST NOT appear in any TraceMarker.text or phase1Trace metadata, per DD-7 / Layer Purity Invariant.
